description: A2A Plane source-public approval rehearsal packet schema. Deterministic GO_CANDIDATE / NO_GO / NEEDS_OPERATOR_APPROVAL decision output for the source-public approval rehearsal round. Produces operator-facing approval packets with integrated evidence bundles, rollback/abort paths, and explicit non-approval/non-execution semantics. This round never executes approval, release, or visibility changes.

gates.title: Broker read-only readiness
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Broker readiness evidence is missing or does not pass all read-only health, worker matrix, queue/stale closeout checks.
evidence: Broker health check passes with ok=true, including revision/build version evidence.
Worker capacity matrix confirms all expected workers online.
Queue/stale closeout confirms queued=0, claimed=0, running=0, stale=0.
Migration health gate passes all checks.

gates.title: Plugin operator-facing status and projection
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Plugin operator-facing status/projection evidence is missing or does not confirm read-only projection state.
evidence: Plugin configuration is read-only; no live Telegram/provider send configured.
Operator-facing status confirms notification delivery is disabled or projection-only.
Gateway health report shows ok status.
Plugin approval separation is verified: operator approval gate is distinct from plugin status.

gates.title: Docker runner evidence
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Docker runner scan/history evidence is missing or does not pass deterministic validation.
evidence: Runner artifact manifest is present and valid.
Deterministic scanner/history scan profile passes.
Redacted artifact bundle contains no runtime/bootstrap files or secrets.

gates.title: Public/private boundary
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Repository remains private; public transition is NO_GO.
evidence: GitHub metadata shows repository is still private before approval.
Docs and examples contain no private endpoints, provider identifiers, raw session dumps, host-specific private paths, or runtime/bootstrap context files.
Public-facing wording describes A2A Plane as alpha/feedback-welcome, not production-ready.

gates.title: Terminal evidence
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Terminal requester/operator-visible evidence is missing or only shows accepted-send/provider message IDs; approval rehearsal is NO_GO.
evidence: A linked, redacted terminal evidence packet proves requester-visible or operator-visible terminal receipt for the candidate flow.
Provider message IDs, send-result success, queued/accepted states, or delivery attempts are labeled accepted-send evidence only and are not treated as terminal ACK.
Evidence postdates the last commit that changes terminal-evidence or receipt-routing behavior.

gates.title: Replay-safety proof
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Replay-safety proof for terminal evidence is missing, stale, or disputed; approval rehearsal is NO_GO.
evidence: A linked, redacted replay/canary run shows duplicate sends or retries cannot mint a false terminal ACK.
Idempotency keys, receipt correlation, or equivalent replay controls are identified without exposing secrets or provider identifiers.
Replay-safety evidence postdates the last commit touching terminal evidence, receipt routing, or retry behavior.

gates.title: Scanner output evidence (secret/history)
gates.blockedWhenMissing: External scanner evidence is absent or unavailable; approval rehearsal is NO_GO.
evidence: At least one supported external scanner, such as gitleaks or trufflehog, ran against the candidate tree/history.
Findings are clean or explicitly dispositioned by the operator using redacted metadata only.
Scanner evidence postdates the last commit touching secrets-adjacent paths.

gates.title: OpenClaw runtime/bootstrap hygiene
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Runtime/bootstrap context files would enter the branch or evidence; stop before PR/Done evidence.
evidence: Branch diff excludes all denyPaths.
Artifact and PR/issue evidence exclude all denyPaths and raw runtime/session context.

gates.title: GO/NO_GO matrix
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Any unresolved required gate leaves the aggregate decision NO_GO.
evidence: Each required gate has a named owner, status, evidence link, and timestamp.
The aggregate decision is GO_CANDIDATE only when every required gate is GO.

gates.title: Redacted evidence policy
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Evidence contains raw secrets, private paths, provider identifiers, terminal ACK mutations, or raw session dumps; stop and post Block evidence only.
evidence: Issue and PR evidence includes commands, exit statuses, finding counts/classes, commit SHA, and linked artifacts only.
Matched secret values, host-specific private paths, provider IDs, Telegram IDs, and raw session dumps are never pasted.

gates.title: Explicit operator approval (separate from execution)
gates.blockedWhenMissing: No explicit operator approval for source-public execution; final decision is NEEDS_OPERATOR_APPROVAL.
evidence: Approval is a linked issue/PR comment from the operator and explicitly names source-public execution/publication.
Approval is separate from execution and does not bundle deploys, restarts, DB mutations, provider sends, terminal ACKs, secret rotation/disclosure, history rewrite, or force-push.
Source-public execution remains NO_GO until this gate is explicitly GO.

gates.title: Approval packet integrity
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Approval packet is structurally incomplete or missing required evidence bundles.
evidence: Approval packet schema validates structurally: all required gates present with status, evidence URLs, and timestamps.
Integrated evidence bundles link each gate's evidence URLs to redacted external sources.
Deterministic packet rendering produces identical output for identical input.

gates.title: Replay/no-duplicate rehearsal idempotency proof
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Rehearsal idempotency or replay/no-duplicate proof is missing; approval packet cannot be trusted.
evidence: Rehearsal was run at least twice with identical input producing identical approval packet output.
No duplicate approval packets, false terminal ACKs, or provider-side receipts are minted.
Idempotency key, run identifier, or equivalent uniqueness control is identified and redacted.

gates.title: Rollback/abort path
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Rollback and abort paths are not documented; approval packet is not production-safe.
evidence: Rollback procedure is documented: stop rehearsal, revert to previous state, no side effects.
Abort path is documented: halt all approval-related processing, leave no partial state.
Both rollback and abort are no-live: they do not deploy, restart services, send provider messages, or mutate databases.
